playbook.intent: Engineer wants to add a new lib / SDK. Before merge: AI runs SBOM diff, supply-chain scan, license check; security-conscious engineer reviews the diff + alternatives. Decision recorded as a lightweight ADR. Auto-applied for ultra-trivial bumps via Renovate handoff.
playbook.scope: Engineer wants to add a new lib / SDK. Before merge: AI runs SBOM diff, supply-chain scan, license check; security-conscious engineer reviews the diff + alternatives. Decision recorded as a lightweight ADR. Auto-applied for ultra-trivial bumps via Renovate handoff.

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Justify the Dependency

tasks.task: Document the use case and alternatives considered
Confirm we can't build it cheaply in-house

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the justification is on paper.

stage.name: Inspect the Package

tasks.task: Pin the version; review release notes and CHANGELOG
Run SCA (e.g., Snyk / Trivy) for known CVEs
Check maintainer activity and download trend

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no critical CVE is open and maintainer signal is healthy.

stage.name: Sandbox & Surface Risk

tasks.task: Enumerate what it reads, writes, and sends over the network
Check transitive deps for risky packages
Run it in a sandboxed environment for behaviour

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when surface is acceptable and behaviour is clean.

stage.name: Decide & Document
stage.intent: Approve / reject with a written trail.

tasks.task: Write the security review decision: approve / reject / approve-with-controls
Add to the approved-deps registry with the trail

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a signed-off security decision in the registry.
